m1-4-u1.title: Unit 1: What Do You Do in Your Free Time?

vocab.sentence: His body is perfect for the sport.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他的體格非常適合這項運動。

vocab.sentence: I swim with my friends every Sunday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我每個星期天都和朋友去游泳。

vocab.sentence: If you like sports, then join us.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果你喜歡運動，那麼加入我們吧。

vocab.sentence: Jason and his brother swim on weekends.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 傑森和他弟弟週末都會去游泳。

vocab.sentence: Why don't you join the music club?
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你為什麼不加入音樂社？

vocab.sentence: I don't know the new student.
He is two hundred centimeters tall.
Does she play the guitar every day?
The elephant has a large body.
He is a strong basketball player.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他是一位強壯的籃球員。

vocab.sentence: Kevin Durant is a great NBA player.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 杜蘭特是一位偉大的 NBA 球員。

vocab.sentence: He puts his all into every game.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他全力投入每一場比賽。

vocab.sentence: James and Curry are very different.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 詹姆士和柯瑞非常不同。

vocab.sentence: Curry is a top NBA player.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 柯瑞是頂尖的 NBA 球員。

phrases.sentence: A: He is a great player. B: You can say that again!
phrases.sentence_chinese: A: 他是一位偉大的球員。 B: 一點也沒錯！

phrases.sentence: We fly a kite at the park on Sundays.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們星期天都會去公園放風箏。

phrases.sentence: My mom makes a cake for me every year.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我媽媽每年都會為我做一個蛋糕。

phrases.sentence: He puts his all into the game.
There are a lot of basketball players.
On the other hand, Curry is not very tall.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 另一方面，柯瑞並不是很高。

phrases.sentence: He makes up for it with a lot of practice.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他靠大量的練習來彌補。

phrases.sentence: He stands out in every game.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他在每一場比賽中都很突出。

tips.label: 現在簡單式
tips.text: 表示現在的狀態、習慣、重複動作或真理。

tips.label: 外觀描述
tips.text: 主詞 + have/has + 形容詞 + 身體部位。

tips.label: 身高詢問
tips.text: How tall + be + 主詞? (答句：He is 180 cm tall.)

notes.title: 動詞三單變化
notes.rule: 主詞為 he, she, it 時，動詞需加 -s 或 -es。
notes.description: 字尾 sh, ch, o 加 es (goes, watches)；子音+y去y加ies (studies)；不規則變化 have 變 has。

notes.title: 助動詞與原形動詞
notes.rule: 否定或疑問句使用 do/does 後，動詞必用原形。
notes.description: Does he practice? (對) / Does he practices? (錯)。

notes.title: 身高單位規則
notes.rule: hundred 不加 s；centimeter 超過 1 需加 s。

quiz.question: A: ______ Shin do in his free time? B: He plays the piano.
quiz.hint: 單三主詞用 Does 提問。

quiz.question: My brother ______ very much. He is on the school team.
quiz.hint: 單三動詞加 s，運動習慣用複數。

quiz.question: A: You are a top player! B: ______.
quiz.hint: 表示強烈認同對方的說法。

quiz.question: We ______ a cake for our mom every year.
quiz.hint: 第一人稱複數用原形動詞。

quiz.question: The NBA player is two ______ and six centimeters tall.
quiz.hint: 數詞 hundred 之後不可加 s。

quiz.question: A: ______ does Mr. Lee take a walk? B: At 6 p.m. every day.
quiz.hint: 詢問具體幾點幾分用 What time。

quiz.question: My sister ______ long arms, but I don't.
quiz.hint: 單三主詞描述特徵用 has。

quiz.question: Kevin is not very tall, but he ______ for it with hard work.
quiz.hint: make up for 為固定片語表示彌補。

quiz.question: A: Do they ______ every afternoon? B: No, they don't.
quiz.hint: 助動詞 Do 之後接原形動詞。

quiz.question: Curry ______ his all into every game.
quiz.hint: 單三主詞現在式動詞加 s。

quiz.question: A: Does Abby have a big nose? B: ______. Her nose is small.
quiz.hint: 根據事實否定回答。

quiz.question: How ______ is the boy? He is 160 cm.
quiz.hint: How tall 詢問身高。

quiz.question: The elephant ______ strong legs and large ears.
quiz.hint: 單三主詞描述器官特徵用 has。

quiz.question: A: Who ______ dinner every day? B: My father does.
quiz.hint: Who 當主詞詢問時，動詞用單三。

quiz.question: The girl ______ to K-pop songs every night.
quiz.hint: 主詞 The girl 為單數。

quiz.question: A: Do you have a guitar? B: ______.
quiz.hint: 用 Do 問，用 do 答。

quiz.question: My parents ______ TV at six thirty every morning.
quiz.hint: 複數主詞使用原形動詞。

quiz.question: I don't have any brothers, ______ I have three sisters.
quiz.hint: 前後語意相反，使用轉折詞。

quiz.question: Sammy ______ Blackpink very much.
quiz.hint: 單三主詞 like 加 s。

quiz.question: A: ______ do you do after school? B: I practice the piano.
quiz.hint: 詢問「做什麼事情」。

quiz.question: They ______ fly a kite on weekends.
quiz.hint: 複數否定用 don't。

quiz.question: His body is ______ for the sport.
quiz.hint: 根據課文，形容體格「完美」。

quiz.question: A: Does she study English with her sister? B: ______.
quiz.hint: 簡答要用助動詞。

quiz.question: He is a top player, and he ______ in every game.
quiz.hint: 表現傑出用 stand out。

quiz.question: A: How tall are you? B: I'm 175 ______.
quiz.hint: 超過一公分，單位需用複數型。

quiz.question: A: ______ do you and your parents have dinner? B: At my grandpa's place.
quiz.hint: 答句為地點，疑問詞用 Where。

quiz.question: He is 160 ______ tall.
quiz.hint: 縮寫 cm 不論單複數均不加 s。

quiz.question: Mrs. Jones ______ long hair. Her hair is very short.
quiz.hint: 描述目前擁有的外觀特徵用 has。

quiz.question: What K-pop band ______ Sammy ______? B: Blackpink.
quiz.hint: 助動詞 does 後接原形動詞。

quiz.question: A: Do you read comic books? B: No, I ______. I don't read them.
quiz.hint: 用 Do 提問，否定回答用 don't。

quiz.question: The students ______ basketball on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
quiz.hint: 複數主詞 students 接原形動詞。

quiz.question: Shin ______ songs or ______ music in his free time.
quiz.hint: 主詞 Shin 為單三，兩動詞皆須加 s。

quiz.question: There ______ many good basketball players in the USA.
quiz.hint: 後接複數名詞，使用 There are。

quiz.question: How ______ is Frank? B: He is 160 centimeters.
quiz.hint: 詢問身高固定用 How tall。

quiz.question: My dog ______ big ears and a small nose.
quiz.hint: 動物主詞（單數）描述特徵用 has。

quiz.question: My parents ______ go to work on Sundays. They stay at home.
quiz.hint: 複數否定一般動詞用 don't。

quiz.question: Jason and his brother ______ on weekends.
quiz.hint: 複數主詞用原形動詞。

quiz.question: A: Who ______ dinner for your family? B: My brother and sister do.
quiz.hint: Who 當主詞詢問「是誰」時動詞用單三。

quiz.question: I help my mom in the ______ after school.
quiz.hint: 根據課文情境，在廚房幫媽媽忙。

quiz.question: He takes a walk ______ 6 p.m. every day.
quiz.hint: 具體時刻前用介係詞 at。

quiz.question: Elephants' legs ______ strong and large.
quiz.hint: 主詞為 legs (複數)，接形容詞需用 be 動詞。

quiz.question: You have a ______ nose. It's not large.
quiz.hint: 根據後句 not large 判定為 small。

quiz.question: Kevin Durant is a ______ NBA player. Everyone knows him.
quiz.hint: 頂尖球員用 top player。

quiz.question: He is not a ______ basketball player, but he practices hard.
quiz.hint: a born player 意指天生的球員。

quiz.question: He stands ______ in every game because he puts his all into it.
quiz.hint: stand out 意為表現傑出。

quiz.question: I ______ swim, but I ______ paint pictures.
quiz.hint: 能力對比：會游泳但不會畫畫。

quiz.question: Everyone in the park is ______ a kite.
quiz.hint: be 動詞後接 V-ing 表示正在進行。

quiz.question: The player has long ______ and long ______.
quiz.hint: 描述身體部位通常用複數。

quiz.question: James practices every day and ______ his all into every game.
quiz.hint: 對應主詞 James (單三)，動詞用 puts。

quiz.question: I ______ have any brothers, but I have three sisters.
quiz.hint: 第一人稱一般動詞否定用 don't。

vocab.sentence: His body is perfect for the sport.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他的體格非常適合這項運動。

vocab.sentence: Jason and his brother swim on weekends.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 傑森和他弟弟週末都會去游泳。

phrases.sentence: A: He is a great player. B: You can say that again!
phrases.sentence_chinese: A: 他是一位偉大的球員。 B: 一點也沒錯！

phrases.sentence: We fly a kite at the park on Sundays.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們星期天都會去公園放風箏。

phrases.sentence: He puts his all into the game.
He makes up for it with a lot of practice.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他靠大量的練習來彌補。

phrases.sentence: He stands out in every game.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他在每一場比賽中都很突出。

grammar.sentence: I fly a kite in the park on Sundays.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我星期天在公園放風箏。

grammar.sentence: My brother practices basketball every day.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我哥哥每天練習籃球。

grammar.sentence: She has big eyes and a small mouth.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她有一雙大眼睛和一個小嘴巴。

grammar.sentence: How tall is your brother?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你哥哥多高？

grammar.sentence: He is one hundred and eighty centimeters tall.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他身高 180 公分。

grammar.sentence: What do they do in their free time?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們空閒時間做什麼？

grammar.sentence: Curry puts his all into every game.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 柯瑞全力投入每一場比賽。

grammar.sentence: He makes up for it with a lot of practice.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他靠大量的練習來彌補。

grammar.sentence: James and Curry are very different players.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 詹姆士和柯瑞是非常不同的球員。

grammar.sentence: Does she play the guitar every afternoon?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她每天下午彈吉他嗎？

grammar.sentence: My sister has long arms but my brothers don't.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我姊姊手臂很長，但我兄弟們沒有。

grammar.sentence: Who makes dinner for your family every day?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 誰每天為你家人做晚餐？

grammar.sentence: Elephants have strong legs and large ears.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 大象有強壯的腿和大耳朵。

grammar.sentence: I don't know the new student from the USA.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我不認識那個來自美國的新學生。

grammar.sentence: You can say that again about the top player!
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你說那位頂尖球員的事一點也沒錯！

grammar.sentence: Everyone in the park is flying a kite.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 公園裡的每個人都在放風箏。

grammar.sentence: The player has long legs and long arms.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那位球員有長腿和長手臂。

grammar.sentence: I can swim but I can't paint.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我會游泳但我不會畫畫。

grammar.sentence: Shin writes songs and plays the piano in his free time.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Shin 在空閒時間寫歌和彈鋼琴。

grammar.sentence: There are many good basketball players in the USA.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 美國有很多優秀的籃球員。

grammar.sentence: He is not a born basketball player, but he practices.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他不是天生的籃球員，但他很努力練習。

grammar.sentence: He stands out in every game because of hard work.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 因為努力，他在每場比賽中都很突出。

grammar.sentence: My parents watch TV at six thirty every morning.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我爸媽每天早上六點半看電視。

grammar.sentence: What do you do after school every day?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你每天放學後做什麼？

grammar.sentence: Who makes dinner for your family every day?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 每天誰為你家人煮晚飯？

grammar.sentence: My sister has long hair and a small mouth.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我姊姊留著長髮，有個小嘴巴。

grammar.sentence: Kevin Durant is a great NBA player from the USA.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 凱文·杜蘭特是位來自美國的偉大 NBA 球員。

grammar.sentence: They play basketball on Fridays after school.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們星期五放學後打籃球。

grammar.sentence: He is two hundred and six centimeters tall.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他身高 206 公分。

grammar.sentence: You can say that again about his perfect body!
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你說他完美的體格真的一點也沒錯！
